put.description:
Update a station. Owners may edit their own row; superusers may edit any.
Non-owners get 403 on a public station, 404 on a private one (matching
`read_station`'s existence-leak avoidance).

post.description: OAuth2 compatible token login, get an access token for future requests

Create new user without the need to be logged in.

The response is intentionally the same regardless of whether the email was
already taken, so callers cannot enumerate existing accounts. A real
confirmation-email flow is not yet implemented (see FOLLOWUPS).

get.description: Get a specific user by id.
